finding: ATM-GOV-0153 requires at least one real paired single-Agent versus Team Agents dogfood sample with provider billable usage, model identities, pricing catalog version, wall-clock time, and quality outcome. The current environment has no provider billable usage or paired live run evidence, so Team promotion remains measurement-incomplete.
expectedBehavior: Team Agents promotion must stay disabled until a real paired sample records provider billable usage, model identities, pricing catalog version, wall-clock metrics, and quality outcome. Fixture or simulated numbers may remain diagnostic only and must keep promotionEligible false.
evidenceOrRepro: artifacts/generated/team-dogfood/real-paired-sample.json records sampleKind live-paired-run-blocked, measurementStatus measurement-incomplete, providerBillableUsage false, pairedRunId null, pricingEvidenceKind missing, and promotionEligible false.
followUp: Run a paid/provider paired dogfood sample, archive redacted provider billable usage and model identities, then update artifacts/generated/team-dogfood/real-paired-sample.json and rerun node --strip-types tests/cli/team-agents-dogfood.test.ts plus node --strip-types tests/cli/governance-cost-bench.test.ts before closing ATM-GOV-0153.
